---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us maintain the Linguistic System of Record
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## I. Description
A clear and concise description of the linguistic or technical anomaly.

## II. Reproduction (Golden I/O)
* **Input Locale**: (e.g., `ar-EG-u-nu-latn`)
* **Expected Output Traits**:
* **Actual Output Traits**:

## III. System Impact
Which part of the 5-phase pipeline is failing? (Resolve, Aggregate, Override, Integrity, Telemetry)

## IV. Environment
* **Registry Version**: (e.g., `0.1.4`)
* **SDK State**: (Ready, Degraded, Bootstrapping)
